The genus Pteroceras is part of the subtribe Coelogyneinae, which is a subunit of the orchid family Orchidaceae. The Orchidaceae family is a large and diverse group of flowering plants that also includes the popular houseplant Phalaenopsis. The Coelogyneinae subtribe includes various species of orchids native to tropical regions of Asia, including Pteroceras zollingeri. This classification highlights the unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships of Pteroceras zollingeri within the orchid family.
